---
title: "Release notes"
description: "Current UIAO release notes — rendered from the canonical RELEASE_NOTES.md at the repo root."
categories: [meta]
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Canonical source
This page renders the canonical
[`RELEASE_NOTES.md`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/RELEASE_NOTES.md)
at the repository root.
:::

{{< include ../../RELEASE_NOTES.md >}}
